## Summary

<!-- What changed? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

## Scope check

- [ ] This change stays within the current project scope.
- [ ] This change does not add visual effects, camera presets, shader APIs, particles, timelines, or large demo templates.
- [ ] This change does not add runtime dependencies to the core package.
- [ ] This change does not expand the public API without explanation.

## Validation

- [ ] pnpm build
- [ ] pnpm package:verify
- [ ] pnpm typecheck
- [ ] pnpm test
- [ ] pnpm lint
- [ ] pnpm format
- [ ] pnpm --filter vite-basic build
- [ ] pnpm pack:dry-run
